creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

I guess that this part of the patch might be wrong:

-MD5 (mysqltuner-0.9.9.pl) = de535154b7fb28e437ba412434ea535e
-SHA256 (mysqltuner-0.9.9.pl) = 51c624b22b5792d7c462171bf39be355b45ed83155e473c259fe67576944daf4
-SIZE (mysqltuner-0.9.9.pl) = 38688
+MD5 (mysqltuner-0.9.9.pl) = 097ceed8577ff4dbed134970fd8781e4
+SHA256 (mysqltuner-0.9.9.pl) = b2c2e455a3789c1d1613404b2f03812906e2f65a7908adbe4eb04ecc34ccc10a
+SIZE (mysqltuner-0.9.9.pl) = 38063

Would you mind to examine it again and maybe revise it?  Thanks!
